messages.name: playwright__browser_click
messages.content:
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await page.locator('//a[text()=\'Images\']').click();
```
### Page
- Page URL: https://www.google.com/imghp?hl=en&ogbl
- Page Title: Google Images
### Snapshot
- [Snapshot](.playwright-mcp\page-2026-05-11T19-13-45-881Z.yml)
